users.addUser.roleNotAssignable: You can't assign this role — it includes access beyond your own.

users.addUser.notGrantable: You can't grant this permission because it isn't part of your own access.
users.addUser.alreadyInherited: Already granted by the role — no need to add it directly.

gst.taxRates.subtitle: Effective-dated statutory GST rate management (GAP-022)
gst.taxRates.compliance.bannerTitle: Rates are statutory — handle with care
gst.taxRates.compliance.bannerBody: GST rates are set by the Finance Ministry and apply from the notified effective date. Creating a new rate version terminates the prior active version. Changes affect new invoices only — filed returns are never retroactively modified.
gst.taxRates.legend.history: Older rate versions are shown dimmed
gst.taxRates.versionHistoryNote: Rates are versioned by effective date. Switch to 'All' to see the full temporal chain for each rate name.
gst.taxRates.empty.title: No rates found
gst.taxRates.empty.body: No GST tax rates match the current filter. Create a new rate version to get started.
gst.taxRates.error.title: Failed to load tax rates
gst.taxRates.error.body: Could not reach the GST service. Please try again.
gst.taxRates.create.title: Create New Rate Version
gst.taxRates.create.description: A new effective-dated version will be created. Any existing active rate with the same name will be automatically terminated.
gst.taxRates.create.terminationNote: Creating this rate will set the valid-to date of the current active rate with the same name to one day before the new valid-from date.
gst.taxRates.deactivate.title: Deactivate Tax Rate
gst.taxRates.deactivate.description: Deactivate '{{name}}'? The rate will be excluded from future resolution but the audit history is preserved.
